description: Valid parameter ranges for llama-server config search

cache_type_k.description: KV cache quantization for keys. Avoid q5_0, iq4_nl — no optimized CUDA kernels on most GPUs.

cache_type_v.description: KV cache quantization for values. Avoid q5_0, iq4_nl — no optimized CUDA kernels on most GPUs.

gpu_layers.description: Number of layers offloaded to GPU. 100 = all layers.

constraints: Higher ctx_size + f16 cache uses more memory — may OOM on smaller GPUs
parallel > 1 multiplies KV cache memory by the number of slots
cache_type_k and cache_type_v should usually match (mixed is rarely beneficial)

budget.description: Maximum number of experiments before stopping
